name: Broccoli Salad with Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Bacon, crisp fried and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together mayonnaise, sugar, and vinegar in a bowl until well combined. Set aside.
2. Cut broccoli into florets.
3. In a large bowl, combine the broccoli florets, shredded cheddar cheese, and crumbled bacon.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients and toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a lid and refrigerate overnight before serving.
